summary: Iteration 164: Comprehensive testing of Phase 5-6 UI refresh complete. All features verified successfully: Login orange glass-morphism card, Dashboard KPI cards with gradient icons and glow effects, Forum page with community sidebar (Top Contributors, category pills, stat cards), Habit Tracker with enhanced streak badges, Rewards page with 3 stat cards + 4 Streak/Activity items, Admin Dashboard with 4 stat cards + 6 quick actions, AI Assistant chat works end-to-end, AI Training with all 4 tabs (Personality, Knowledge Base, Unanswered, Analytics), Sidebar has orange active states with no blue. Both backend APIs tested (POST /api/ai-assistant/chat, GET /api/ai-assistant/admin/stats) returning correct responses.

issues: Onboarding tour modal and 'New Feature: Signal Blocking' modal appear on page transitions - may need session-based dismissal to avoid repetitive popups

critical_code_review_comments: Orange theme (#F97316) properly implemented across all pages - no blue remaining
Forum page: Community info sidebar with banner, category pills (All, General, Trading, Technical, Announcements), Top Contributors section, stat cards (Posts/Open/Solved/Comments) all working
Habit Tracker: Enhanced streak badges with glow effects (Current Streak, Best Streak, Total Days), Growth Roadmap, Community Knowledge quiz section
Rewards page: 3 stat cards (Points Balance, Level with progress, Monthly Rank) with gradient icons and glows, plus 4 Streak/Activity stats grid
Admin Dashboard: 4 stat cards (Total Members, Active Today, AI Sessions, Knowledge Base) + 6 quick actions + Platform Overview section + AI alert banner
AI Training page: 4 tabs working (Personality config, Knowledge Base CRUD, Unanswered questions with badge, Analytics)
Profit Tracker & Trade Monitor: Load without errors, decimal dimming visible on stat values
Sidebar: Orange active states confirmed (rgb(251, 146, 60) = orange-400), no blue classes found

success_rate.backend: 100% (2/2 API tests passed - POST chat, GET stats)

context_for_next_testing_agent: UI refresh Phases 1-6 complete. All features verified: Login (orange glass-morphism), Dashboard (KPI cards with gradient icons), Forum (community sidebar with Top Contributors, category pills), Habit Tracker (streak badges with glow), Rewards (3 stat cards + 4 activity stats), Admin Dashboard (4 stats + 6 quick actions), AI Assistant (RyAI/zxAI chat), AI Training (4 tabs). Sidebar uses orange-400 for active states. Feature announcement modals may overlay content on page transitions.
